purpose: Prove the first-principles SC-evaluation pipeline reproduces an AMBIENT superconductor's measured Tc — the gate-(c) axis companion to the H3S high-Tc track (§9.12). Ties to the Nb BCS universal-gap attestation (PR #299).
system: Nb (niobium), BCC ibrav=3, a=3.3004 Å (celldm=6.2368 bohr), 1 atom/cell, ambient pressure

method.scf: ecutwfc=45 Ry, ecutrho=450 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid (413 irreducible), MP smearing degauss=0.025 Ry; Fermi 18.02 eV, 9s
method.phonon_elph: ph.x DFPT ldisp 4x4x4 q (8 irreducible, weights [1,3,3,3,2,3,1,1]), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma=0.005, el_ph_nsigma=10; ~25 min
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc

ambient_ML_BETE_NET.note: ambient ML wildly off on simple 1-atom Nb too

verdict: SUCCESS — first-principles DFT reproduces Nb's measured Tc 9.25K (Tc_AD 9.9-13K, mu*=0.13) with literature-consistent lambda~1.0. Textbook-quality agreement (~10-40%) certifies the pipeline to MEASUREMENT-GRADE for an AMBIENT superconductor. This is the gate-(c) axis proof: the SC-evaluation pipeline produces measurement-matching Tc for ambient-pressure SC. Combined with H3S (high-Tc coupling track, §9.12), the pipeline brackets the RTSC corner: ambient-Tc accuracy (Nb) + high-Tc strong-coupling capture (H3S).
honest_notes: omega_log 192K is ~25% below literature (250-275K); the slight Tc over-estimate vs 9.25K is partly this. Still within first-principles tolerance.
Nb is LTS (9.25K, ambient) — NOT RTSC. This proves the pipeline's ambient-Tc measurement-accuracy, NOT an RTSC material.
DFT is Tier-1 prediction (gate_type=simulation-only-prediction, absorbed=false). Not a measured oracle; it predicts what measurement confirms.
Double-validation of Nb: BCS universal-gap-ratio attestation (PR #299, 0.309% rel_err) + first-principles el-ph Tc (this record). Two independent first-principles routes both confirm Nb.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. Pattern 1+2 보호. Real RTSC absorbed=true still needs ambient + Tc>=270K + wet-lab (gate OPEN).
citations: PR #299 — Nb BCS universal-gap-ratio attestation (sim.hexa v0.3.0)
